llm_instructions.secondary_language_notes: Code comments and some QA docs mix Spanish and English.
truth_policy: Treat 'implemented' facts as grounded in the quesedice repository paths cited.
Do not invent features, integrations (Telegram bot, YouTube pipeline, etc.) unless listed under roadmap_or_not_in_repo.
When uncertain, state uncertainty and suggest verifying the file path in evidence_paths.
README version label ('V2') is marketing/versioning in README.md; internal product phase may differ (V0 Identity Epoch / V1 Commercial) — do not conflate without explicit user confirmation.
recommended_usage: Paste this entire JSON as system or project context for ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, etc.
For code edits, also attach the specific file(s) being changed.
For deployment questions, distinguish vercel.json production vs 'npx serve' local static-only.
response_style_requested_by_project: Prefer vanilla-first solutions; no React migration assumed.

document.repository_root_hint: Static site + Vercel serverless for Qué Se Dice (QSD), Argentina.
document.companion_artifact: QSD_MASTER_CONTEXT_V1.json (operational snapshot; may be older timestamp than this file)

classification_legend.implemented: Present in repository files as described.
classification_legend.experimental: Exists but not the main public product surface.
classification_legend.roadmap: Strategic intent not fully implemented as a product module.
classification_legend.hypothesis: Plausible but not proven in repo.
classification_legend.historical_audit: Described in qa/*.md from a past date; re-verify before assuming current runtime.

v0_identity_epoch.status: Formally frozen by product decision (conversation 2026); micro-debugging of legacy visual debt (opacity, blur, palette edge cases) deprioritized unless it blocks production.
claimed_achievements_conversation_aligne: Deterministic editorial doctrine (QA manifests, ranking windows, UI translation rules).
Local-first client memory (IndexedDB ledger; no external analytics in manifest).
Runtime QA philosophy (curl-first audits, SW caveats documented).
Editorial identity pages (sobre-qsd, redaccion, home stream/signal UI).
Operational pipeline (feeds, rank, story, sitemap, r redirect).
Automated ingestion/ranking (RSS + Google News RSS endpoints).
Human-in-the-loop validation (manual redaccion HTML/JSON; editorial QA scripts).
Conceptual foundation for scalable signal-processing (rank + stream + variants).

v1_commercial_editorial_infrastructure.strategic_objective: Commercial-grade editorial infrastructure: security runbooks, observability, partner-ready SLAs, selective distribution (e.g. Discord digest pattern), without rewriting architecture.

identity.apex_redirect: quesedice.com.ar -> www (permanent) via vercel.json host condition

positioning_implemented_in_copy.sobre_qsd: Editorial digital reader-first; territorial Corrientes/Argentina/regional-international; legacy Antonio Haedo; operator Gonzalo Haedo (Nordia).
positioning_implemented_in_copy.index_public_strings: Still contain 'Noticias', 'Portal', 'Agregador' in meta/masthead — tension with broader 'observatory' framing.

architecture.pattern: Monolithic static HTML shell + client JS + Vercel Edge (majority) and Node (filesystem notes) serverless handlers.

characteristics: Large inline <style> and <script> block (single file maintenance burden).
Google Fonts: Playfair Display, Libre Baskerville, Source Sans 3.
Shared CSS variables: css/qsd-tokens.css linked from index, redaccion, sobre-qsd.
Client fetches: /api/rank?limit=30 for portada with no-store; fallback /api/feeds?cat=; /redaccion/index.json for editorial rail.
PWA: service-worker.js registers; precache includes '/' — bump CACHE string when critical HTML must invalidate client caches.
frontend.api_bypass_rule: Same-origin /api/* uses fetch(req) without cache in SW (see service-worker.js)

rewrites_summary: SPA fallback: negative lookahead excludes api/, css/, redaccion/, sobre-qsd/, rqsd/, qa/, lib/ then -> /index.html

endpoints.role: RSS aggregation; FEEDS categories; MAX_AGE_HOURS 24 on handler output; deduplicateItems; parseRSSItems with feed_gate + isRenderReady.
Nordia-style rank; MAX_AGE_HOURS 24; MIN_CORRIENTES; editorial_score 0..1 formula; sorts by editorial_score then published_ts.
Story HTML by id; in-memory TTL cache 60s (globalThis) per README.
XML sitemap; internal dependency on ranking/story URLs.
Redirect resolver with host allowlist + TLD suffix allowlist.
URL resolution; HIGH outbound-abuse risk documented in qa/QSD_FULL_AUDIT_REPORT.md — treat as sensitive.
SVG semantic thumb; states NOT a news photo.
Image proxy/helper JSON for story thumbnails.
Lists JSON files from /notas directory via fs.readdir.
Filesystem write; gated by QSD_ALLOW_LOCAL_FS_WRITES per README.
Filesystem write; gated by QSD_ALLOW_LOCAL_FS_WRITES per README.

feeds_pipeline_detail.parseRSSItems: Extracts item title, link, pubDate, description, source; normalizes title; pushes items then feed_gate then isRenderReady.
feed_gate_removed_legacy: Spanish stopword heuristic gate (isSpanish) removed — curation belongs in rank/score not style regex.
Parse-time .gob.ar/.gov.ar skip removed from parseRSSItems loop.
Corrientes category post-map filter isCorreintesRelevant removed — rank/geo handles nuance.
feeds_pipeline_detail.deduplicateItems_fix: Non-duplicate items with no words length>=4 after normalization are now kept (push even when words set empty).
feeds_pipeline_detail.isRenderReady_rules: title len>=5; http(s) URL; non-empty source string; valid pubDate; age between 0 and 72 hours.

notes: editorial_score = min(1, factos_final*0.7 + freshness*0.3 + geoBoost) with geoBoost 0.15 for Corrientes-dictionary hits in title+description.
Front-end getEditorialVariant uses threshold 75 for c-signal on score — may rarely trigger when data from rank is 0..1; known contract tension.

major_ui_blocks: Fixed site-header; sticky nav; trending bar optional
Three-column content-shell: QSD Stream (sticky), main container (hero wheel + grids), Redacción QSD rail
Hero cards: hero-card--main / secondary; variants c-urgent, c-signal, c-analisis, c-archivo, c-filo from getEditorialVariant
News cards with same variant classes; semantic thumbnails when no remote image
Panels: saved, backup JSONL export/import, install tooltip, update toast for SW
debug_ui=1 reveals raw scoring labels per QA manifest

visual_stabilization_notes.c_archivo: .c-archivo uses opacity 1; compound selectors a.hero-card.c-archivo and a.news-card.c-archivo with opacity 1 !important to defeat stale cached CSS; header/nav use backdrop-filter none explicitly in index.html.
visual_stabilization_notes.deprioritized: Further micro-tuning of glass/blur/palette per V0 freeze policy unless production-blocking.

redaccion.authors: Entries use 'Redacción QSD' as author field in JSON

editorial_content.footer_lineage: Taetanoticias → Corrientes Dice → Qué Se Dice; since 2004; Antonio & Gonzalo Haedo

scripts.role: Deterministic curl checks; writes qa/runtime_report.txt and qa/runtime_findings.md
Lightweight smoke on /, feeds, rank, story test, sitemap
Documented in qa/QSD_RUNTIME_HARDENING.md for clean vercel dev
Referenced for killing duplicate vercel dev
Orchestrator; default BASE_URL https://qsd-seven.vercel.app; layers qa.sh, structure-validator, content-integrity, editorial-audit
Posts QA failure to Discord webhook env DISCORD_WEBHOOK_QA

qa_and_quality_factory.system_freeze_audit: system-freeze-audit.sh outputs qa/system_audit_* snapshots (cpu, memory, dmesg grep, processes, etc.)

items.v1_action: Allowlist, internal proxy, or disable public surface.

items.note: Disabled by default in serverless; not durable multi-instance.
Always verify with curl; single vercel dev process.

already_viable_for: Public reader product with ads/sponsorship conversation (site already live).
Demonstration of ranked regional signal to chambers, universities, SMEs (manual SLA).
Editorial supplement via redaccion/ static publishing workflow (git-based).
not_yet_viable_for_without_work: Legally sensitive automated advice (health, legal) — human sign-off and domain-specific compliance required.
Guaranteed sub-second global API latency under arbitrary RSS fan-out

ordered: 1. Security closure on resolve + policy review on r.
2. Minimal production monitoring: uptime checks + optional Discord alert reuse from qa_notify_discord pattern.
3. Written SLA template for partners (what rank guarantees vs what RSS third parties guarantee).
4. CI wiring: run qa/run-all.sh or runtime-audit against preview on each merge.
5. Content ops checklist for redaccion publishing + incident log when a source misbehaves.
6. Postpone: React migration, heavy design system, AI-generated article body as core product.

structural_difference_vs_generic_ai_news: Deterministic scoring and dictionaries tied to Corrientes/NEA entities in code, not a single LLM summarizer bolt-on.
Explicit UI doctrine forbidding dashboard leakage to readers (QA manifest).
Operational QA scripts treating the system as infrastructure, not a demo.
Human redaction path integrated in-site (redaccion rail + pages).

scalable_pattern_to_other_verticals.pattern: Replace FEEDS sources + domain dictionaries + disclosure copy; keep rank+stream+manual notes architecture.
scalable_pattern_to_other_verticals.caveat: Each vertical requires compliance review; not automatic from this repo.

package_and_tooling.implication: Local npm dev does NOT execute Vercel edge functions — use npx vercel dev for API-integrated local testing.

roadmap_or_not_in_repo.rss_outbound_syndication_feed: roadmap — product consumes RSS; generating outbound RSS would be new work.
roadmap_or_not_in_repo.managed_apm: roadmap — no Sentry/Datadog SDK in repo.

glossary.Nordia: Operator context name in sobre-qsd copy (Gonzalo Haedo).
glossary.EQF: Referenced in commented pipeline diagram inside api/feeds.js — not a separate deployed service in repo.
glossary.Factos: Colloquial naming in rank pipeline for convergence-related scoring fields exposed to client as factos_final / editorial_score.

indexeddb_ledger.purpose: Append-only style local event log; export JSONL from UI backup panel.

environment_variables_documented.name: QSD_ALLOW_LOCAL_FS_WRITES
environment_variables_documented.usage: Must be set to enable notas-save/ingesta-save writes (README)

environment_variables_documented.name: BASE_URL
environment_variables_documented.usage: qa/run-all.sh and other QA scripts defaulting to preview host
